ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Quae hactenùs adversùs Morbos adinventa sunt, luculenter & brevissimè explicans.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: In the preface, the author mentions Francesco D`Andrea and the controversy over Galen`s theories aroused between the Investiganti Academy and the Discordanti Academy in Naples.
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Vidit D. Franciscus Aloysius Barelli Cler. Reg. Cong. S. Pauli, & in Metrop. Bononien. Poenit. pro Eminentiss. & Reverendiss. Domino D. Jacobo Boncompagno Archiepiscopo, & Principe. Die 2. Aprilis 1697. De mandato P. Reverendiss. Inquisitoris Bonomiae, vidi, & attente legi Praeclarissimi Viri Lucae Tozzi Medicinam practicam, & nihil inveni, quod impressionem de novo impediat. Io: Hieronymus Sbaraleus Mediciane Doctor, & Lector Publicus. Stante praedicta attestatione Imprimatur Iterum Fr. P. G. Ordinis Praedicatorum Vicarius Sancti Officii Bonomiae.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
